MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROBERT VISTE POQUEZ' DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 6 AND 7 TO PROVIDE REQUIRED SPECIFICITY AS TO THIS DEFENDANT'S ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATIONS.
